holdings.infoBox: SDY is an equity ETF with a total of 158 individual holdings. The top holdings are Verizon Communications stock at 2.36%, Realty Income at 2.12%, QUALCOMM at 1.84%, Kenvue at 1.68%, and Kimberly-Clark at 1.64%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Dividend ETF (SDY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats index. The fund tracks a yield-weighted index of dividend-paying companies from the S&P 1500 Composite Index that have increased dividends for at least 20 consecutive years. SDY was launched on Nov 8, 2005 and is issued by State Street.
